  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AidBox
    Contract describing the AidBox behaviour
    AidBoxException
    Exception thrown when an error occurs related to AidBox class
    Container
    Contract representing a container behaviour
    ContainerException
    Exception thrown when an error occurs related to Container class
    GeographicCoordinates
    Contract representing geographic coordinates behaviour
    Importer
     
    Institution
    Contract representing an Aid Institution behaviour when dealing with Aid Boxes, containers and their measurements
    InstitutionException
    Exception thrown when an error occurs in the AidBox class
    ItemType
    Enumeration describing the item type
    Measurement
    Contract representing a Measurement from a container
    MeasurementException
    Exception thrown when an error occurs related to the Measurement class
    PickingMap
    Contract representing a Collection of Routes for a date.
    PickingMapException
    Exception thrown when an error occurs related to Picking Map class
    PickingMapException
    Represents an exception that occurs when a picking map is invalid
    Report
     
    Route
    Contract representing a route for item picking
    RouteException
    Represents an exception that occurs when a route is invalid
    RouteGenerator
    Contract representing a Route Generator
    RouteValidator
     
    Strategy
     
    Vehicle
    Represents a vehicle behavior that can be used to transport containers
    VehicleException
    Exception thrown when an error occurs related to Vehicle class
